description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after a golden bear animatronic, featuring a textured, worn yellow-gold exterior with visible seams and patchwork details. The bear has a large, rounded head with one ear partially missing, a black top hat, and a black bow tie, giving it a formal yet eerie appearance. Its eyes are asymmetrical, with one eye socket empty and the other containing a red, glowing eye, while colored wires protrude from the damaged side of the head. The mouth is wide and segmented, showing white teeth, and the limbs are jointed, resembling an animatronic structure. The arms and legs are thick and segmented, with some exposed wiring and mechanical details, and the hands and feet are rounded and paw-like. The overall look is both playful and unsettling, with a mix of plush and mechanical elements, making it stand out as a unique urban toy.
description: A golden bear animatronic stuffed toy with a black top hat, bow tie, and visible mechanical details, featuring a worn, patchwork appearance and exposed wires.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, black top hat, bow tie, asymmetrical eyes, and exposed wires on the right side of the head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, segmented limbs, and the protruding wires from the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and limbs, with the top hat and overall worn texture visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the bear's profile, segmented limbs, and the damaged ear with exposed wires.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is unsettling, with a wide, segmented mouth showing teeth and asymmetrical eyes—one empty socket and one glowing red eye—conveying a haunting, eerie look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows and legs straight, the head is facing forward with a slight tilt.
